languages.text: "Не беспокойся. Я действую по плану. Все идет, как задумано".
"Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."
languages.original_text: "Не беспокойся. Я действую по плану. Все идет, как задумано".

traits.locale_text: "Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."
"Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."
"Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."

languages.text: «No se preocupe; estoy siguiendo el plan. Todo procede según lo previsto».
languages.original_text: "Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."

traits.locale_text: «No se preocupe; estoy siguiendo el plan. Todo procede según lo previsto».

languages.text: “别担心。我在按计划行事。一切都很顺利。”
languages.original_text: "Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."

traits.locale_text: “别担心。我在按计划行事。一切都很顺利。”

languages.text: « Pas de panique. Je suis le plan à la lettre. Tout se passe comme prévu. »
languages.original_text: "Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."

traits.locale_text: « Pas de panique. Je suis le plan à la lettre. Tout se passe comme prévu. »

languages.text: "Endişelenme. Plana sadığım. Her şey, olması gerektiği gibi ilerliyor."
languages.original_text: "Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."

traits.locale_text: "Endişelenme. Plana sadığım. Her şey, olması gerektiği gibi ilerliyor."

languages.text: "Keine Sorge. Ich halte mich an den Plan. Alles ist in bester Ordnung."
languages.original_text: "Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."

traits.locale_text: "Keine Sorge. Ich halte mich an den Plan. Alles ist in bester Ordnung."

languages.text: 「心配しないで。計画通りに動いています。すべて順調です。」
languages.original_text: "Don't worry. I am following the plan. Everything is proceeding accordingly."

traits.locale_text: 「心配しないで。計画通りに動いています。すべて順調です。」
